verses.text: Be strong in grace; commit the truth to 'faithful men'; 'endure hardness, as a good soldier.' Pass it on. The gospel is handed to faithful teachers.
Be strong in grace; commit the truth to 'faithful men'; 'endure hardness, as a good soldier.' Pass it on. The gospel is handed to faithful teachers.
Be strong in grace; commit the truth to 'faithful men'; 'endure hardness, as a good soldier.' Pass it on. The gospel is handed to faithful teachers.
No soldier entangles himself with the world; the labourer is 'first partaker of the fruits.' Single-minded. Christ's servant keeps free for his Master's work.
No soldier entangles himself with the world; the labourer is 'first partaker of the fruits.' Single-minded. Christ's servant keeps free for his Master's work.
No soldier entangles himself with the world; the labourer is 'first partaker of the fruits.' Single-minded. Christ's servant keeps free for his Master's work.
No soldier entangles himself with the world; the labourer is 'first partaker of the fruits.' Single-minded. Christ's servant keeps free for his Master's work.
Remember Jesus Christ raised from the dead; 'I endure all things for the elect's sakes.' For the elect. He suffers gladly that others be saved.
Remember Jesus Christ raised from the dead; 'I endure all things for the elect's sakes.' For the elect. He suffers gladly that others be saved.
Remember Jesus Christ raised from the dead; 'I endure all things for the elect's sakes.' For the elect. He suffers gladly that others be saved.
If we be dead with Him, we shall live with Him; 'if we deny him, he also will deny us.' Faithful sayings. Our destiny is bound to Christ.
If we be dead with Him, we shall live with Him; 'if we deny him, he also will deny us.' Faithful sayings. Our destiny is bound to Christ.
If we be dead with Him, we shall live with Him; 'if we deny him, he also will deny us.' Faithful sayings. Our destiny is bound to Christ.
'Study to shew thyself approved... rightly dividing the word of truth'; shun vain babblings. Handle aright. The workman rightly divides God's word.
'Study to shew thyself approved... rightly dividing the word of truth'; shun vain babblings. Handle aright. The workman rightly divides God's word.
'Study to shew thyself approved... rightly dividing the word of truth'; shun vain babblings. Handle aright. The workman rightly divides God's word.
Their error eats 'as doth a canker'; Hymenaeus and Philetus said the resurrection is past. Spreading error. False doctrine corrupts like gangrene.
Their error eats 'as doth a canker'; Hymenaeus and Philetus said the resurrection is past. Spreading error. False doctrine corrupts like gangrene.
'The foundation of God standeth sure'; let him that names Christ 'depart from iniquity.' Sure ground. God knows His own, who turn from sin.
'The foundation of God standeth sure'; let him that names Christ 'depart from iniquity.' Sure ground. God knows His own, who turn from sin.
'The foundation of God standeth sure'; let him that names Christ 'depart from iniquity.' Sure ground. God knows His own, who turn from sin.
Flee youthful lusts; follow righteousness; the Lord's servant 'must not strive; but be gentle.' Gentle pursuit. Holiness and gentleness mark the servant.
Flee youthful lusts; follow righteousness; the Lord's servant 'must not strive; but be gentle.' Gentle pursuit. Holiness and gentleness mark the servant.
Flee youthful lusts; follow righteousness; the Lord's servant 'must not strive; but be gentle.' Gentle pursuit. Holiness and gentleness mark the servant.
In meekness instruct opposers, 'if God peradventure will give them repentance.' Patient hope. God alone grants the change of heart.
